html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<title>Interactive Figure</title>
<style>
  html, body { margin:0; padding:0; width:100%; height:100%; overflow:hidden; background:#fff; }
  svg { width:100%; height:100%; }
  .tooltip { position:fixed; background:rgba(0,0,0,0.55); color:#fff; font:11px/1.4 sans-serif; padding:3px 8px; border-radius:4px; pointer-events:none; z-index:100; white-space:nowrap; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<svg viewBox="0 0 600 150" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet">
  <defs>
    <style type="text/css">
      .axis path,
      .axis line {
        fill: none;
        stroke: black;
        shape-rendering: crispEdges;
      }
    </style>
  </defs>

  <!-- (a) -->
  <g transform="translate(0,0)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="150" height="150" fill="none" stroke="none"></rect>
    <path d="M0,130 Q75,20 150,130" stroke="black" fill="none"/>
    <text x="75" y="145" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-family="sans-serif">(a)</text>
  </g>

  <!-- (b) -->
  <g transform="translate(150,0)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="150" height="150" fill="none" stroke="none"></rect>
    <path d="M0,130 Q75,10 150,130" stroke="black" fill="none"/>
    <text x="75" y="145" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-family="sans-serif">(b)</text>
  </g>

  <!-- (c) -->
  <g transform="translate(300,0)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="150" height="150" fill="none" stroke="none"></rect>
    <path d="M0,130 Q75,40 150,130" stroke="black" fill="none"/>
    <text x="75" y="145" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-family="sans-serif">(c)</text>
  </g>

  <!-- (d) -->
  <g transform="translate(450,0)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="150" height="150" fill="none" stroke="none"></rect>
    <path d="M0,130 L25,130 Q75,10 125,130 L150,130" stroke="black" fill="none"/>
    <text x="75" y="145" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-family="sans-serif">(d)</text>
  </g>
</svg>

<script>
  try {
    const svg = document.querySelector('svg');
    const tooltip = document.createElement('div');
    tooltip.className = 'tooltip';
    document.body.appendChild(tooltip);

    function showTooltip(evt, text) {
      tooltip.textContent = text;
      tooltip.style.left = `${evt.clientX + 12}px`;
      tooltip.style.top = `${evt.clientY + 12}px`;
      tooltip.style.display = 'block';
    }

    function hideTooltip() {
      tooltip.style.display = 'none';
    }

    function showPopup(title, body) {
      window.parent.postMessage({ type: 'alex-popup', title, body }, '*');
    }

    function hidePopup() {
      window.parent.postMessage({ type: 'alex-popup', title: null }, '*');
    }

    document.addEventListener('mousemove', function (e) {
      if (e.target.closest('g')) {
        showTooltip(e, 'Graph representation');
      } else {
        hideTooltip();
      }
    });

    svg.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
      if (e.target.closest('g')) {
        showPopup('Graph Information', 'This graph shows a specific mathematical function.');
      } else if (e.target === svg || e.target.tagName === 'svg') {
        hidePopup();
      }
    });

    document.addEventListener('keydown', function (e) {
      if (e.key === 'Escape') hidePopup();
    });
  } catch (e) {
    console.error('Error in script execution:', e);
  }
</script>
</body>
</html>
